prompt: Any issues with this n8n workflow? [AI Support Agent with OpenAI Chat Model wired via main instead of ai_languageModel, missing respondToWebhook]
assertions: The output identifies that OpenAI Chat Model is wired via 'main' instead of 'ai_languageModel'
The output classifies the wrong AI sub-node connection type as an Error
The output states the correct connection type should be 'ai_languageModel'
The output warns that there is no respondToWebhook node despite responseMode being 'responseNode'
The output does NOT flag the Webhook node's typeVersion or path as issues
The output does NOT flag the AI Agent node's configuration as problematic
The output correctly identifies the OpenAI Chat Model node by name in the finding
The output does not report any false errors on the @n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain node types
The output does NOT flag the OpenAI Chat Model node type '@n8n/n8n-nodes-langchain.lmChatOpenAi' as a wrong prefix
The output does NOT suggest the AI Agent node's text parameter is misconfigured
The output identifies both issues (wrong connection type AND missing respondToWebhook) not just one
